```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement security incident response procedures"
---
# Incident Response
## Task
Define and implement security incident response procedures.
## Requirements
1. Define incident severity levels (P1-P4). 2. Create response playbooks per incident type.
3. Implement automated alerting for critical events. 4. Define communication templates and escalation paths.
5. Conduct post-incident reviews.
## Constraints
- P1 response within 15 minutes. Document everything. Preserve evidence.
## Success Criteria
- Incidents classified and responded to by severity. Playbooks tested. Post-mortems conducted.
```
